value.found_quote: Bash permission rules support wildcard matching with `*`. Wildcards can appear at any position in the command, including at the beginning, middle, or end... #### Compound commands Claude Code is aware of shell operators, so a rule like `Bash(safe-cmd *)` won't give it permission to run the command `safe-cmd && other-cmd`... #### Process wrappers Before matching Bash rules, Claude Code strips a fixed set of process wrappers so a rule like `Bash(npm test *)` also matches `timeout 30 npm test`.
value.name: Bash permission rules with wildcards for compound commands and process wrappers
